message:
fix(gateway): checkpoint caching layer and websocket tests

## Checkpoint Service Caching
- Add in-memory cache layer on top of SQLite storage
- loadCheckpoint(): Fetches from DB and caches in memory
- ensureAgentCheckpointList(): Lazily loads agent's checkpoint IDs

## Checkpoint Operations Improvements
- deleteCheckpoint(): Use DB delete instead of Map manipulation
- pruneCheckpoints(): Batch delete with inArray() for efficiency
- Add TODO for dependent checkpoint check (needs schema enhancement)

## WebSocket Module Tests
- cursor.test.ts: Tests for cursor pagination utilities
- ring-buffer.test.ts: Tests for fixed-size output buffer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
